sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) part. act. f. of the verb גָּלָה No. 2; collect. a band of exiles, exiles (comp. sing. גֹּולֶה an exile, 2Sa 15:19), Ezr 1:11 9:4 Jer 28:6 Eze 1:1 3:11 , 15 Eze 3:15 11:24 , 25 Eze 11:25and used also of those who have again returned into their country, Ezr 10:8 (Arab. جَالَةُ and جَالِيَةُ exiles).

(2) abstr. exile, migration. 1Ch 5:22, עַד־הַגֹּולָה “until the exile.” בְּלֵי הַגֹּולָה “equipment for exile,” Eze 12:7. הָלַךְ בַּגֹּולָה Jer 29:16, etc. “to go into exile.” בְּנֵי הַגֹּולָה exiles; also, those who have returned from captivity, Ezr 4:1 6:19 8:33 .
